hooks.command: PLUGIN_ROOT="${CODEGRAPH_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; if [ -z "$PLUGIN_ROOT" ]; then echo "[CodeGraph Intelligence] CODEGRAPH_PLUGIN_ROOT is not set; skipping hook."; exit 0; fi; SCRIPT="$PLUGIN_ROOT/scripts/check-codegraph.sh"; if [ ! -x "$SCRIPT" ]; then echo "[CodeGraph Intelligence] Hook script not executable at $SCRIPT; skipping hook."; exit 0; fi; "$SCRIPT"
